headline: A Look At Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: How Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) stock has been moving Cognizant Technology Solutions (CTSH) has caught investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months despite positive annual revenue and net income growth. headline: Travelport, Cognizant and Anthropic Collaborate to Power Travel Technology for the AI Era
summary: Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH) is working with Travelport on a strategic AI transformation that will deploy Anthropic's Claude to modernize the way Travelport builds, tests and maintains software across its travel retailing and distribution platforms. The collaboration aims to accelerate the delivery of AI-led innovation to airlines, hoteliers, travel management companies and online travel agencies worldwide, while embedding AI features within Travelport's platform.
